label: The Lot-Sigil Stores
description: The Lot-Sigil Stores serves as the enclosed storage room of The Iron Catechism, built in ribbed ferrocrete with void-black adamantine reinforcements that mirror the counter’s austere frontage. Numbered shelving bays and sealed transit crates stand in strict rows, each face tagged with Munitorum lot-sigils, quarantine tallies, and inventory stamps. The air carries a persistent metallic dryness from desiccant canisters and filtered vents, while red auspex indicators and hard lumen-strips keep the chamber in perpetual inspection brightness. A grated deck and drain channels emphasize containment practice, prioritizing discipline, separation, and rapid issue under siege protocol.
